plan_review_notes: Plan matches the implemented scope: MCP discovery/template splitting, schema surface repair, stable placeholder reads, unavailable feature artifact responses on issue tasks, and focused regression coverage.

plan_review_history.notes: Aligned the task docs with the implemented MCP contract repair: generic template token detection across task and evolution URIs, resilient discovery that skips invalid URI definitions, stable placeholder responses for pre-merge promotion/changeset reads, explicit unavailable payloads for feature artifact resources on non-feature tasks, and targeted regression coverage in MCP server/core/adapter tests.

Plan matches the implemented scope: MCP discovery/template splitting, schema surface repair, stable placeholder reads, unavailable feature artifact responses on issue tasks, and focused regression coverage.

spec_review_notes: Froze the contract for resilient MCP resource discovery and schema publication: generic URI template handling, task/evolution markdown MIME normalization, listed repro surface, and stable placeholder/unavailable payloads for incomplete lifecycle state.

normal_cases.name: Resource listing cleanly separates concrete resources from template resources across task and evolution URI patterns.
MCP clients can discover the full intended schema, including `task://<task-id>/repro`, without stale entries breaking the list.

edge_cases.name: Invalid URI definitions in the published resource list are skipped instead of crashing discovery.
Pre-merge `promotion` and `changeset` resources return stable placeholders instead of raising file-not-found errors.

exception_cases.name: Feature-only artifact resources read from issue tasks return explicit unavailable payloads instead of leaking projection exceptions.

verification_methods.target: Resource listing cleanly separates concrete resources from template resources across task and evolution URI patterns
MCP clients can discover the full intended schema, including task://<task-id>/repro, without stale entries breaking the list
